lint.output: 3 pre-existing warnings only (addEdge unused import in flow-canvas.tsx; handleAddTouchpoint/handleAddStage in journey-canvas-view.tsx). No new warnings.

notes: Wrapped handleAddStep (deps: workspaceId, tabId, onStepCreate, onStepSelect) and handleAddSection (deps: workspaceId, tabId, onSectionCreate) in React.useCallback. Added both to handleKeyDown's dependency array. No behavioral change — keyboard shortcuts N (new step) and S (new section) continue to work identically. No infinite re-render risk: all deps are stable primitives or parent-provided callbacks.
